name: Bits UI
description: Headless component primitives for Svelte with accessibility and full customization

description.value: Headless component primitives for Svelte with accessibility and full customization

active-maintenance.comment: Very active - v2.14.4 released November 2025; 314 releases; 1,468 commits; 94 contributors; built for Svelte 5

framework.comment: Built specifically for Svelte 5; native Svelte library without wrappers or compatibility layers

styling-approach.comment: Headless/unstyled - ships with minimal styling, giving complete design control; works with Tailwind, vanilla CSS, or any styling solution

component-model.comment: Headless primitives - provides behavior and accessibility only; built on top of Melt UI with a more ergonomic component API

typescript.comment: Written in TypeScript (79.4% of codebase); fully typed API

ssr-compatible.comment: SSR/SvelteKit compatible; use latest version (v1.x+/v2.x) for proper Svelte 5 SSR support

rsc-compatible.comment: Not applicable - Svelte library, not React

design-system.comment: No design system - headless library for building your own design system; used as foundation for shadcn-svelte

dark-mode.comment: Unstyled - dark mode implementation left to consumer

theming-system.comment: Unstyled - theming implementation left to consumer

css-variables.comment: Provides CSS variables for animation (e.g., --bits-accordion-content-height); minimal built-in CSS

design-tokens.comment: No built-in design tokens - headless approach

rtl-support.comment: RTL support through proper ARIA implementation

component-count.comment: 41 components: Accordion, Alert Dialog, Aspect Ratio, Avatar, Button, Calendar, Checkbox, Collapsible, Combobox, Command, Context Menu, Date Field, Date Picker, Date Range Field, Date Range Picker, Dialog, Dropdown Menu, Label, Link Preview, Menu, Menubar, Meter, Navigation Menu, Pagination, Pin Input, Popover, Progress, Radio Group, Range Calendar, Rating Group, Scroll Area, Select, Separator, Slider, Switch, Tabs, Time Field, Time Range Field, Toggle, Toggle Group, Toolbar, Tooltip

text-input.comment: No text input component - use native HTML input elements

textarea.comment: No textarea component - use native HTML textarea

select.comment: Select component for single selection dropdown

multi-select.comment: No dedicated multi-select; compose with Combobox or other components

combobox.comment: Combobox component for searchable/filterable select with autocomplete

checkbox.comment: Checkbox component for accessible checkbox implementation

radio.comment: Radio Group component for accessible radio buttons

switch-toggle.comment: Switch component for toggle switches; also Toggle and Toggle Group components

tag-input.comment: No dedicated tag input component (unlike Melt UI which has Tags Input)

pin-input.comment: Pin Input component for OTP/PIN code input with keyboard navigation and screen reader compatibility

date-picker.comment: Date Picker component; also Date Field for text input with date parsing

time-picker.comment: Time Field and Time Range Field components for time input

date-range-picker.comment: Date Range Picker and Date Range Field components; also Range Calendar

rating-input.comment: Rating Group component for star rating or similar input

input-groups.comment: No input groups component - compose manually

input-with-dropdown.comment: No dedicated input with dropdown; compose with Combobox or Popover

button-groups.comment: Toggle Group component for grouped button behavior; Toolbar component for button groups

split-button.comment: No split button component; compose with Dropdown Menu

table.comment: No table component - use native HTML tables

data-table.comment: No data table component; shadcn-svelte (built on Bits UI) provides Data Table

tree-view.comment: No tree view component (unlike Melt UI which has Tree builder)

card.comment: No card component - purely visual component, use HTML/CSS

badge.comment: No badge component - purely visual component

calendar.comment: Calendar component for month view; Range Calendar for date range display

alert.comment: No alert component - purely visual; Alert Dialog is for confirmations

toast-notification.comment: No toast component (unlike Melt UI); shadcn-svelte uses Sonner for toasts

progress-bar.comment: Progress component for accessible progress indicators

spinner-loader.comment: No spinner component - purely visual component

skeleton.comment: No skeleton component - purely visual component

empty-state.comment: No empty state component - purely visual component

modal-dialog.comment: Dialog component with focus trap following WAI-ARIA modal pattern; also Alert Dialog for confirmations

drawer-sheet.comment: No dedicated drawer component; compose with Dialog; shadcn-svelte provides Sheet wrapper

popover.comment: Popover component for floating content anchored to trigger

tooltip.comment: Tooltip component for accessible hover hints

dropdown-menu.comment: Dropdown Menu component for action menus; also general Menu component

context-menu.comment: Context Menu component for right-click menus

command-palette.comment: Command component for keyboard-driven command menu (Cmd+K style) with search and ARIA support

tabs.comment: Tabs component for tab-based content switching

breadcrumb.comment: No breadcrumb component - simple navigation, use HTML/CSS

pagination.comment: Pagination component for page navigation controls

navigation-menu.comment: Navigation Menu component for site navigation with dropdowns; also Menubar component

sidebar.comment: No sidebar component - layout component; shadcn-svelte provides Sidebar wrapper

grid.comment: No grid component - layout component, use CSS

stack.comment: No stack component - layout component, use CSS

container.comment: No container component - layout component, use CSS

aspect-ratio.comment: Aspect Ratio component for maintaining aspect ratios

collapsible.comment: Collapsible component for expandable/collapsible sections; also Accordion component

resizable.comment: No resizable panel component; shadcn-svelte provides Resizable wrapper

rich-text-editors.comment: No official rich text editor integration

form-libraries.comment: No official form library bindings; shadcn-svelte uses Formsnap/Superforms

animation-libraries.comment: Works with Svelte's built-in transitions; provides CSS variables for animations; supports forceMount for custom transitions

icon-libraries.comment: No bundled icons - headless approach allows any icon library

date-libraries.comment: Date components use @internationalized/date for localization and timezone support

aria-compliant.comment: Built with accessibility as core principle; follows WAI-ARIA design patterns; proper aria attributes and roles

keyboard-navigation.comment: Full keyboard navigation built-in; follows WAI-ARIA keyboard interaction patterns

screen-reader-tested.comment: Keyboard navigation, screen reader support, and focus management are all built-in; designed for accessibility

focus-management.comment: Proper focus handling; Dialog implements focus trap following WAI-ARIA modal pattern; auto-focus on first focusable element

wcag-level.comment: No explicit WCAG compliance level documented; follows WAI-ARIA design patterns

accessibility-rating.comment: Excellent - accessibility-first design following Radix UI and Melt UI patterns; WAI-ARIA compliant; full keyboard and screen reader support

bundle-size-full.comment: Full bundle not typically measured; DatePicker alone adds ~137KB gzipped due to complexity (Date Field + Popover + Calendar)

bundle-size-core.comment: Individual component sizes vary; described as moderate (Melt UI + wrapper layer); tree-shaking issues with Vite reported

tree-shakeable.comment: Supports tree-shaking but Vite has issues with barrel imports; PR in progress for direct component imports

zero-runtime.comment: JavaScript runtime required for component behavior and accessibility features

lazy-loading.comment: Individual components can be imported and loaded on demand

documentation-quality.comment: Good documentation with API reference, examples, and accessibility sections for each component; interactive examples; compound component patterns explained

interactive-docs.comment: Documentation includes interactive component previews with code examples

figma-kit.comment: Community Figma kit available on Figma Community

cli-generator.comment: No CLI - installed via npm; shadcn-svelte (which uses Bits UI) has a CLI

npm-weekly-downloads.comment: 217,211 weekly downloads as of December 2025; classified as popular; 142 dependent packages

commercial-support.comment: Open source MIT licensed; community support via Discord; no paid enterprise tier

style-override.comment: Unstyled - apply any styles via class or style prop; data attributes for state-based styling; CSS variables for animations

compound-components.comment: Compound component pattern (e.g., Accordion.Root, Accordion.Item, Accordion.Trigger, Accordion.Content)

render-props.comment: Child snippet feature provides render prop-like customization while maintaining accessibility

slots.comment: Svelte native slots; full control over component structure through compound components

unstyled-mode.comment: Completely unstyled by default - that's the entire point of the library; provides foundation for building styled components
